reviews.comment:
No aceptan pagos con la App ni crédito. No funcionan los infladores

(Translated by Google)
They don't accept app payments or credit. The inflators don't work.

reviews.comment:
Siempre cargo ahí cuando estoy en mdq .x seguridad en el combustible y la muy buena atención

(Translated by Google)
I always fill up there when I'm in Mar del Plata. Because of the fuel safety and the excellent service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtdDZTX3dRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Casi nunca tienen sistema y no aplican los descuentos, la atención muy buena

(Translated by Google)
They almost never have their system down and don't apply the discounts, but the service is very good.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtcDlPNU9REAE

reviews.comment:
Todo de 10! Volviendo del.finde largo me solucionaron un percanse que tuve con mucho prifesionalismo y ganas.

(Translated by Google)
Everything was perfect! Coming back from the long weekend, they resolved a problem I had with great professionalism and enthusiasm.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtaDdPYlhnEAE

reviews.comment:
Me gustó la atención y como te ayudan muy ganchitos todos
El servicio mecánico muy malo daninos y rayaron mí auto no hay quien controle nada no lo recomiendo

(Translated by Google)
I liked the service and how helpful everyone was; they were very friendly. However, the mechanical service was very bad; they damaged and scratched my car. There was no one in charge of anything, and I don't recommend it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtMl9iMW5BRRAB

reviews.comment:
